title: Diagnose tree diseases
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose tree diseases demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess environmental impact

pcs.text: Identify tree species and determine its region of origin and seasonal growth characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tree species and determine its region of origin and seasonal growth characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree species and determine its region of origin and seasonal growth characteristics.

pcs.text: Determine current and past cultural practices and impact on tree health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine current and past cultural practices and impact on tree health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine current and past cultural practices and impact on tree health.

pcs.text: Determine characteristics of growing environment affecting growth of tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine characteristics of growing environment affecting growth of tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine characteristics of growing environment affecting growth of tree.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and cultural factors predisposing tree to disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and cultural factors predisposing tree to disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and cultural factors predisposing tree to disease.

pcs.text: Determine and assess physical and chemical properties of the soil or growing media
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and assess physical and chemical properties of the soil or growing media?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and assess physical and chemical properties of the soil or growing media.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess environmental impact

elements.title: Identify diseased trees

pcs.text: Identify trees displaying disease symptoms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify trees displaying disease symptoms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify trees displaying disease symptoms.

pcs.text: Recognise natural defence systems of trees for major disease types
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise natural defence systems of trees for major disease types?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise natural defence systems of trees for major disease types.

pcs.text: Determine disease groups according to classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine disease groups according to classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine disease groups according to classification.

pcs.text: Investigate trees for signs and symptoms of disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate trees for signs and symptoms of disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate trees for signs and symptoms of disease.

pcs.text: Determine impact of disease type on tree parts and systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine impact of disease type on tree parts and systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine impact of disease type on tree parts and systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify diseased trees

elements.title: Diagnose tree disease

pcs.text: Record symptoms and signs of disease according to accepted nomenclature
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record symptoms and signs of disease according to accepted nomenclature?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record symptoms and signs of disease according to accepted nomenclature.

pcs.text: Collect and collate samples and evidence of disease and reference according to industry procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and collate samples and evidence of disease and reference according to industry procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and collate samples and evidence of disease and reference according to industry procedures.

pcs.text: Determine the nature and severity of the disease condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the nature and severity of the disease condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the nature and severity of the disease condition.

pcs.text: Determine disease type according to disease classification procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine disease type according to disease classification procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine disease type according to disease classification procedures.

pcs.text: Research and identify disease according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and identify disease according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and identify disease according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Prepare specimens of diseases for examination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare specimens of diseases for examination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare specimens of diseases for examination.

pcs.text: Collect and package specimens in preparation for despatch to specialist for diagnosis and laboratory testing according to biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and package specimens in preparation for despatch to specialist for diagnosis and laboratory testing according to biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and package specimens in preparation for despatch to specialist for diagnosis and laboratory testing according to biosecurity procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Diagnose tree disease

elements.title: Provide a prognosis

pcs.text: Determine the current health and vigour of the tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the current health and vigour of the tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the current health and vigour of the tree.

pcs.text: Assess the severity and extent of the disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the severity and extent of the disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the severity and extent of the disease.

pcs.text: Research the virulence of the disease on the specific host
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the virulence of the disease on the specific host?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the virulence of the disease on the specific host.

pcs.text: Determine the phenology of the host and the disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the phenology of the host and the disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the phenology of the host and the disease.

pcs.text: Research and consider constraints for management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and consider constraints for management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and consider constraints for management options.

pcs.text: Consider influences of environmental conditions on host, disease and management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider influences of environmental conditions on host, disease and management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider influences of environmental conditions on host, disease and management options.

pcs.text: Document prognosis and report according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document prognosis and report according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document prognosis and report according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Provide a prognosis

elements.title: Develop, document and monitor the management program

pcs.text: Investigate and recommend management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and recommend management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and recommend management options.

pcs.text: Develop a disease management program according to industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a disease management program according to industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a disease management program according to industry best practice.

pcs.text: Record and document tree diseases and management programs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and document tree diseases and management programs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and document tree diseases and management programs according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor, review and update management plans.
